name: Meituan
description: Meituan is a leading Chinese technology retail company that operates a comprehensive platform for local services, including on-demand food delivery, in-store services, hotel and travel bookings, and instant retail. Founded in 2010 and headquartered in Beijing, the company pursues a "Retail + Technology" strategy to fulfill its mission of helping people eat better and live better. Meituan focuses on the digital transformation of service and commodity retail, continuously investing in R&D to enhance consumer experiences and support merchant growth across its vast network of services.
